templates.otp: Your JoonaPay verification code is: {otp}. Valid for 5 minutes. Do not share this code.
templates.otp_fr: Votre code de verification JoonaPay est: {otp}. Valide pendant 5 minutes. Ne partagez pas ce code.
templates.deposit_initiated: Your deposit of {amount} {currency} is being processed. Ref: {reference}
templates.deposit_completed: Your deposit of {amount} {currency} is complete. New balance: {balance} USDC
templates.withdrawal_initiated: Your withdrawal of {amount} {currency} to {destination} is being processed.
templates.withdrawal_completed: Your withdrawal of {amount} {currency} to {destination} is complete.
templates.login_alert: New login to your JoonaPay account from {device}. If this wasn't you, secure your account immediately.
templates.welcome: Welcome to JoonaPay! Your account is ready. Start by depositing funds to your wallet.
